channel.title: Ramy Zeid - Writing
channel.description: Writing on economics, policy, and methods.

item.title: Why the Care Economy Matters Now
item.description: A short note on why demographic transition makes care policy central to growth and inclusion.

item.title: Measuring Informality Better
item.description: Simple practical improvements for informality measurement in labor force and admin data.

item.title: A Checklist for Policy Briefs that Actually Get Used
item.description: A compact checklist for writing briefs that survive decision timelines.

item.title: Building Reproducible Policy Analytics Pipelines
item.description: How to structure policy analytics so updates are fast, explainable, and auditable.
